# Quiz

<div id="quiz">

<!-- Q1 -->
<div class="question">

<p><strong>Q1.</strong> Match each description with the corresponding R function featured in this chapter.</p>

<ul>
  <li>
    Returns a quantile of a normally distributed random variable:
    <select data-answer="qnorm">
      <option value="">Choose...</option>
      <option value="dbinom">dbinom()</option>
      <option value="pbinom">pbinom()</option>
      <option value="pnorm">pnorm()</option>
      <option value="qnorm">qnorm()</option>
      <option value="pnorm">pnorm()</option>
      <option value="prop.table">prop.table()</option>
    </select>
  </li>

  <li>
    Calculates the probability of a binomial random variable X being at most a specified value:
    <select data-answer="pbinom">
      <option value="">Choose...</option>
      <option value="dbinom">dbinom()</option>
      <option value="pbinom">pbinom()</option>
      <option value="pnorm">pnorm()</option>
      <option value="qnorm">qnorm()</option>
      <option value="pnorm">pnorm()</option>
      <option value="prop.table">prop.table()</option>
    </select>
  </li>

  <li>
    Validates the estimated probabilities described in the Empirical Rule:
    <select data-answer="pnorm">
      <option value="">Choose...</option>
      <option value="dbinom">dbinom()</option>
      <option value="pbinom">pbinom()</option>
      <option value="pnorm">pnorm()</option>
      <option value="qnorm">qnorm()</option>
      <option value="pnorm">pnorm()</option>
      <option value="prop.table">prop.table()</option>
    </select>
  </li>
</ul>

</div>

<!-- Q2 -->
<div class="question">

<p><strong>Q2.</strong> If the chance that it will snow today is 13%, then by the <select data-answer="negation">
      <option value="">Choose...</option>
      <option value="addition">addition</option>
      <option value="delulu">delulu</option>
      <option value="multiplication">multiplication</option>
      <option value="negation">negation</option>
      <option value="three-month">three-month</option>
      <option value="three-month">rizz</option>
    </select> rule, the probability it will not is 87%.</p>

</div>

<!-- Q3 -->
<div class="question">

<p><strong>Q3.</strong> Let’s say an airline sold tickets to 140 people, each of whom will either show up to fly or will not show up to fly. They have observed historically a 9% probability that a passenger will be a no-show for a flight. They issued 140 tickets for 134 seats because they expect at least 6 no-shows. Assume each passenger showing up or not showing up to fly are independent. What is the probability that there are fewer than 6 no-shows?</p>

<ul>
  <li>
    <label>
      <input type="radio" name="q3" value="0.7%">
      0.7%
    </label>
  </li>

  <li>
    <label>
      <input type="radio" name="q3" value="1.1%">
      1.1%
    </label>
  </li>

  <li>
    <label>
      <input type="radio" name="q3" value="1.6%">
      1.6%
    </label>
  </li>

  <li>
    <label>
      <input type="radio" name="q3" value="2.7%">
      2.7%
    </label>
  </li>
  
  <li>
    <label>
      <input type="radio" name="q3" value="97%">
      97%
    </label>
  </li>
  
  <li>
    <label>
      <input type="radio" name="q3" value="99%">
      99%
    </label>
  </li>
</ul>

</div>

</div>

<div id="result"></div>

<button id="prev">Previous</button>
<button id="next">Next</button>

<button id="submit">Submit</button>
<button id="reset">Reset</button>

<div id="result"></div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

  // ----------------------------
  // ONE QUESTION AT A TIME SETUP
  // ----------------------------

  const questions = document.querySelectorAll("#quiz .question");
  let currentQuestion = 0;

  // hide all except first
  questions.forEach((q, i) => {
    q.style.display = (i === 0) ? "block" : "none";
  });

  // ----------------------------
  // RANDOMIZE DROPDOWNS
  // ----------------------------

  document.querySelectorAll("#quiz select").forEach(sel => {

    const first = sel.options[0];
    const others = Array.from(sel.options).slice(1);

    others.sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);

    sel.innerHTML = "";
    sel.appendChild(first);
    others.forEach(opt => sel.appendChild(opt));

  });

  // ----------------------------
  // BUTTONS
  // ----------------------------

  const submit = document.getElementById("submit");
  const reset = document.getElementById("reset");
  const result = document.getElementById("result");

  const prev = document.getElementById("prev");
  const next = document.getElementById("next");

  // initial button state
  if (prev) prev.style.display = "none";
  if (submit) submit.style.display = "none";

  // ----------------------------
  // NAVIGATION
  // ----------------------------

  function showQuestion(index) {

    questions.forEach((q, i) => {
      q.style.display = (i === index) ? "block" : "none";
    });

    currentQuestion = index;

    if (prev) prev.style.display = (index === 0) ? "none" : "inline-block";

    if (next && submit) {
      if (index === questions.length - 1) {
        next.style.display = "none";
        submit.style.display = "inline-block";
      } else {
        next.style.display = "inline-block";
        submit.style.display = "none";
      }
    }
  }

  if (next) {
    next.onclick = () => {
      if (currentQuestion < questions.length - 1) {
        showQuestion(currentQuestion + 1);
      }
    };
  }

  if (prev) {
    prev.onclick = () => {
      if (currentQuestion > 0) {
        showQuestion(currentQuestion - 1);
      }
    };
  }

  // ----------------------------
  // SCORING
  // ----------------------------

  submit.onclick = () => {

    let totalScore = 0;
    let maxScore = 0;

    questions.forEach(q => {

      maxScore += 1;

      const selects = q.querySelectorAll("select");
      const radios = q.querySelectorAll("input[type=radio]");

      let questionScore = 0;

      // DROPDOWN
      if (selects.length > 0) {

        const weight = 1 / selects.length;

        selects.forEach(sel => {
          if (sel.value === sel.dataset.answer) {
            questionScore += weight;
          }
        });

      }

      // RADIO
      else if (radios.length > 0) {

        const checked = q.querySelector("input[type=radio]:checked");
        const correctAnswer = "1.1%";

        if (checked && checked.value === correctAnswer) {
          questionScore = 1;
        } else {
          questionScore = 0;
        }

      }

      totalScore += questionScore;

    });

    const percent = (totalScore / maxScore) * 100;

    result.textContent =
      `Score: ${totalScore.toFixed(2)}/${maxScore} = ${percent.toFixed(1)}%`;

  };

  // ----------------------------
  // RESET
  // ----------------------------

  reset.onclick = () => {
    location.reload();
  };

});
</script>
